string asciiPreview = Encoding.ASCII.GetString(fileBytes.Take(Math.Min(fileBytes.Length, 200)).ToArray());

bool looksArmoredPgp = asciiPreview.Contains("BEGIN PGP MESSAGE");

int printableCount = asciiPreview.Count(c =>
    !char.IsControl(c) || c == '\r' || c == '\n' || c == '\t');

bool looksMostlyPrintableText = asciiPreview.Length > 0 &&
                                printableCount >= asciiPreview.Length * 0.90;

bool looksDelimitedDiaText = asciiPreview.Contains('|');

if (!looksArmoredPgp && looksMostlyPrintableText && looksDelimitedDiaText)

Refine DIA encrypted file pre-validation to avoid rejecting binary PGP files
